subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the blessed Tree! That which thou hadst written was noted. In this tempest of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان شجره مبارکه آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملحوظ گردید در این طوفان بلا که
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
